notes: 3.11.80 — BCC DOI TAU (file BCC-Doi_tau_05_2026): profile BCC_DOITAU co san DOC DUOC NGAY (125 thuyen vien / 6 tau: Afalina 21, Geo Mariner 22, Geo Supporter 20, Katran 19, Keystone 23, Synergy 20 — cot cong + tong chuan). Va 2 bay truoc khi import that: (1) wantMap them ten sheet thuc te 'Doi tau'; (2) ma DUNG CHUNG ('NTP' cho 20 nguoi nha thau phu) → parser pre-pass dem ma, ma xuat hien >1 dong (khong phai SME*) → doi chieu theo TEN thay vi ma (tranh gan 20 nguoi vao 1 ho so), match ma fail cung fallback ten; canh bao tong hop ma dung chung. Ma SMEV xuat hien 2-3 lan la DOI TAU giua thang — hop le, giu nguyen tung dong. Rollback=3.10.41.
